title: MICU) Input Inspection
system: Driver Information System Driver Information System (Combination Meter Control Unit

crossRefs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

blocks.text: Driver Information System (Combination Meter Control Unit, MICU) Input Inspection
2. Perform input checks and if all is normal and there is an abnormality in the system Replace the combination meter

rows.text: Inspection items in case of abnormality
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Blown No. A14 (10A) fuse in relay box Blown No. D1 (15A) fuse in sub fuse/relay box Fuse Box Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Blown No. D4 (7.5A) fuse in sub fuse/relay box Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Parking brake Switch ON (depress the pedal)
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Parking brake switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) VSA OFF switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition

blocks.text: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

refs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

blocks.text: 4. Perform input checks and if all is normal and all systems do not buzz Combination Meter Replacement If there is an abnormality in some systems, please contact us. Replace fuse box be just about to Each coupler is all female terminal cord side

24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.

Blown No. A14 (10A) fuse in relay box Blown sub fuse/relay box No. D1 (15A) fuse Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Short circuit between No.J1 and No.T5 terminals
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Relay box No. A14 (10A) fuse blown Fuse Box Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Driver Door switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Assisted door switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.

Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.

Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
L. Rear door switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
PGM-FI ECU Shift position sensor Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G101) Shift position sensor failure Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
There should be continuity between the inspection terminals.
Lighting Switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Headlight switch ON position, disconnect auto light control unit/sensor 7P coupler
There should be continuity between the inspection terminals.
